templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum. Contract terms that add AI-specific provisions (e.g. use of customer data for training, model usage, and AI-related responsibilities) to an existing agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) between a HIPAA covered entity and a business associate.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) governing the provision and use of a cloud-based / SaaS product or service.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) covering the processing of personal data on behalf of a customer in compliance with applicable data protection laws such as the GDPR.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement – Cover Page
templates.description: Fillable cover page for executing the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA). Parties complete the bracketed terms here, which incorporate the Standard Terms by reference to form the executed agreement.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement – Standard Terms
templates.description: Standard Terms for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA), defining the confidentiality obligations that both parties agree to.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement establishing the terms of a go-to-market, referral, or reseller partnership between two companies.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement governing a trial or proof-of-concept evaluation of a product or service for a limited pilot period.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement (SLA) setting out the terms under which software is licensed to a customer.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage collaboration in which a customer helps develop and provide feedback on a new product.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) governing the delivery of professional, consulting, or implementation services.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining service-level commitments such as uptime, support response times, and remedies.
